bullets: MANIFEST format: paths are now project-root-relative (.claude/skills/foo/, docs/getting-started.md). Matches disk layout in both toolkit and consumer.
.claude-toolkit-ignore convention aligned — entries use the same project-root-relative paths as MANIFEST. Old-style entries (skills/foo/, hooks/bar.sh) stop matching; prefix them with .claude/.
claude-toolkit-ignore.template updated with new path convention. New syncs pick it up automatically; existing projects should update hand-maintained entries.
